programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Following an Elvis sighting to The Springwood Hotel a tabloid reporter finds that the phony stories that he writes come true Meanwhile an amnesiac has a terrifying dream that he committed murder before losing his memory

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A nice young southern faith healer uses the miraculous cleansing ability of the corpse of the most evil man in the world to run a small popular sin-extraction business A female reporter and a cynical psycho-killer try to debunk him

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A greedy wife tries to get her dying rich husband to give her the control over his buildings for the poor that she plans to sell Inspired by Dickens Christmas Carol the husbands strange doctor tries to scare her straight

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Doug and Roxanne move to Springwood but while Dougs at work Roxanne begins to unpack and discovers that a mix-up with the movers has left their house filled with someone elses possessions -- in the boxes she finds bloody knives and shredded dresses Meanwhile Emily discovers a stack of 19th century love letters hidden behind a panel in her new home and she begins to envision the relationships of the authors

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: Bells of San Angelo

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: A film director decides to replace his mechanical star with a real oversized ape and turns to Grape Ape in Movie Madness The Grape Ape and Beegle fight bad guys in the old west in Trouble At Bad Rock

programme.title: Hong 115
programme.desc: Hong 115

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: Vietnam Nurses is a 2005 television documentary directed by Polly Watkins It tells the story of six Australian Army nurses who served in a field hospital in Vietnam between the years 1962 and 1972

programme.title: The Forgotten War Between Britain And The USA
programme.desc: In June 1812 the United States of America declared war on Britain and invaded its colony of Upper Canada Britain was already locked in a life and death struggle with Napoleon in Europe leaving Upper Canada poorly defended and vulnerable to attack

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 4
programme.desc: Part 4 Showdown in the Iron Triangle

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: The untold stories of six Australian army nurses who served at the only Australian field hospital in the Vietnam War

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: Colorado
programme.desc: Trouble in Colorado is tying up Union troops needed back east during the Civil War and Lieut Burke is sent to investigate Macklin and his gang are causing the problems and Capt Mason joins them When Burke catches up with them he also finds Mason his brother

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.desc: Filler

programme.desc: In part one an alcoholic professor helps a former student In the second part a womans computer begins talking to her

programme.desc: A female artists nightmares cause her to lose herself in self-pity mixed with egotism

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: An indebted conman meats his match

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A frustrated dreamer turns to the supernatural to achieve success using an ornate pipe to eliminate anyone who gets in his way

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Howell Industries stock collapse leaves the Howells broke The fellow castaways try to cheer them up and try to teach them how to live like the working class

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While the castaways take precautions against a coming typhoon an accidental blow to the head causes Gilligans mouth to act as a radio receiver

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E34
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E34

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E37
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E37

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and Fang investigate an animal spa where other agents dogs killed them after visiting it

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans 318
programme.desc: Hogans 318

programme.title: Hogans 322
programme.desc: Hogans 322

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Photographer with an attitude is assigned to the 73 Crew McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to get rid of her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Ashamed of his desk job Binghamton assumes command of the 73 during McHales absence and takes it out on a combat mission so that he can have a war story to share with his battle-hardened fellow Officers

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future a cross country automobile race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians to gain points that are tallied based on each kills brutality

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 110
programme.desc: Hercules 110

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Earth Final Conflict

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When an alien weapon intended to kill humans via computer systems backfires its creator Kemo is maimed in the process and then sentenced to death for his incompetence Having developed human emotions as a result of his accident Kemo teams with Kincaid to destroy the weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an injured escapee from a mental hospital arrives at Will and Tressas door after running into Alec he claims to be an alien on a mission Hes obviously insane - or is he

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: In order to stop a psychotic priest killer Lt Stone goes undercover as a Roman Catholic priest The victims were all clergymen who studied at the same seminary

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Barney are sent to investigate the case of a scientist who believes her dead husbands ghost is giving her orders on how to complete her important work

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While fleeing authorities Dr Kimble discovers a man who is deathly ill and is also being pursued by the law

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The 12-year-old nephew of Dr Kimbles girlfriend arrives to live with her and recognizes him He hatches a plan with his neighborhood friends to catch him by purchasing a mail-order rifle

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Army scout Cheyenne is court-martialed for cowardice when he wants to abandon Army horses the Army needs to raiders who always know where to strike The post commander is frustrated as is his wife who wants to return back east

programme.desc: Hard Knocks 47 continues with some action packed MMA! This episode features a matchup between amateur debut Austin Russell challenging Reuben Lopez. programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.desc: Mob Candy Gianni Russo

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: When the planets are in line with each other in this particular galaxy it creates a temporary portal out of this universe into a universe of opposites where the evil halves of personalities live Saw Boss tries to trick Jayce into it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ex-minister from West Germany hires VENOM to help him spread a virus that turns money bills into blank pieces of paper
